memory:memory/2026-04-07.md:3:6.snippet: memory/2026-04-07.md: Evening check-in at 7:23 PM.; No direct chat activity in the last 6 hours (main session restricted, but Pulse/Last Check-in is stale).; Pulse status: Mode active.; Checking in on Fence progress and energy levels.

memory:memory/2026-04-06.md:3:6.snippet: memory/2026-04-06.md: Went for a swim this morning.; Rest day for gym.; Heading to the office.; Plan for this evening: Work on Fence, specifically fixing the shortcut logic and finishing onboarding.

memory:memory/2026-04-05.md:3:6.snippet: memory/2026-04-05.md: Feeling great today; high energy.; Just came back from a swim.; Wants to eat and then get back to work.; Wants to finish up work around Fence today.

memory:memory/2026-04-05.md:7:7.snippet: memory/2026-04-05.md: New idea captured: an app that generates iPhone/Mac automations and Shortcuts from natural language by having an LLM write Cherri, with an optional verification/feedback loop.

memory:memory/2026-04-04.md:3:6.snippet: memory/2026-04-04.md: Felt rough after yesterday's party; woke up late and missed the productive morning window.; Afternoon was mostly lunch + TV.; Went to the gym; that was the main win for the day.; Overall felt like a lazy Saturday and wants an early night to reset for Sunday.

memory:memory/2026-04-04.md:7:8.snippet: memory/2026-04-04.md: Current thinking on Fence: stop over-indexing on pre-launch marketing, launch within the next 10 days, then learn from the market after shipping.; Marketing feels both distracting and still somewhat essential, but the app/domain/setup are ready enough that l
